name: Revenue-linked revolving credit on BOTIM business wallet
comment: Machine-readable source for the scorecard in opportunity-intelligence/test-cases/01-revenue-linked-revolving-credit.md. Run: python3 opportunity-intelligence/tools/run.py score knowledge-base/opportunity-scores/opp-001-scorecard.json

pain_severity.basis: Working-capital gap classic SME pain; needs REQ-002 evidence

financial_impact.basis: Informal credit / missed stock assumed >3% of revenue

workaround_cost.basis: Personal cards, supplier terms, informal lenders

willingness_to_pay.basis: Pays more today for worse; unverified

credit_need.basis: Chronic working-capital need assumed for segment

botim_distribution_advantage.basis: Assumed high BOTIM penetration among owners; needs data

transaction_data_advantage.basis: Only if revenue routes into wallet first

payment_revenue_potential.basis: Wallet-in flows earn little; no card spend in v1

credit_risk_visibility.basis: Good only AFTER routing; cold-start blind

competitive_defensibility.basis: Loop defensible once running; cold start copyable

ease_of_validation.basis: Interviews + waitlist + routing pilot all feasible (VE-001 designed)

mvp_feasibility_7wk.basis: Concierge lending on AstraTech licence feasible; auto-limits are not
